bracu_official.title: Last Date of Payment for Summer 2026
bracu_official.summary: The final deadline for making tuition payments for the Summer 2026 semester has been announced.

bracu_official.title: Ashura (Muharram)*-University closed
bracu_official.summary: The university will be closed on June 26th in observance of Ashura (Muharram).

bracu_official.title: BRAC University celebrates International Day of Yoga

bracu_official.summary: BRAC University conducted a 'synergy in action' workshop aimed at strengthening overall workplace effectiveness.
